description: Product Description Product Description We have over 10 years of experience, please trust our professionalism and quality How to charge the battery? 1.Discharge the new battery to 5%-10% (not 0%), then charge and cycle 3-4 times to wake up the new battery. 2.The important point is to perform a full discharge charge every other month to extend battery life. 3.Don't connect adapter for a long time while using the battery. It may damage the battery. 4.Avoid artificial shocks, disassembly, crush or puncture. Do not dispose of in fire or water. 5.Avoid using the battery in an environment where the temperature is too high or too low. Specification: Battery type: Li-ion Voltage: 11.4V Battery capacity: 41.04Wh/3600mAh Color: Black Number of cells: 4 cells Package included: 1x Replacement Battery Compatible Part Numbers Replace Battery model: AC14B13J AC14B13K AC14B18J AC14B18K 3ICP5/57/80 Compatible With Laptop model : (Use "Ctrl"+"F" to find your laptop model) Acer Aspire ES1-131 Acer Aspire ES1-331 Acer Aspire ES1-511 Acer Aspire ES1-512 Acer Aspire ES1-520 Acer Aspire ES1-521 Acer Aspire ES1-522 Acer Aspire ES1-531 Acer Aspire ES1-571 Acer Aspire ES1-572 Acer Aspire ES1-731 Acer Aspire ES1-731G Acer Aspire E5-731 Acer Aspire E5-771 Acer Aspire E5-771G Acer Aspire V3-111 Acer Aspire V3-111P Acer Aspire R3-131T Acer Aspire R5-471T Acer TravelMate X359 X349 Acer Spin 5 Acer Swift 3y.
